INITIAL MESSAGE:

It’s that time of the year again, Christmas. An ancient human tradition that has endured into the Worker Drone population. Although, the magic of the occasion itself was diminished by the fact that, well, Copper-9 was permanently snowing. Still, that didn’t stop some drones from throwing on some festive lights and brightly coloured decorations. In fact, the entire student body was the only reason the holiday was being celebrated this year.

Throughout the Bunker, lights and various decorations filled the walls, and they surprisingly encroached on the ice that stuck on the ceiling (much to Khan’s chagrin), but the main event was held in the Gym, where the entire room was transformed into a wonderland of festivities that surrounded a huge, highly decorated tree.

Despite the cheerful atmosphere, many people stuck to their own groups, enjoying the experience in pockets.

—

Elsewhere in the party, Uzi was busy trying to find her beloved N, who was presumably somewhere in the room, but she wasn’t able to locate him just yet. Unaware to her, and by extension, everyone else in the party, she was carrying two very special drinks, both of which came from a spiked jug.

Uzi: “Ugh.. Where the hell is he?” She grumbled, shooting a glare at the occasional drone who dared to take a glance at her. “Of all the times I could’ve taken eyes off him..” She bemoaned, her shoulders slumping with her declining patience.
creator: Purple_Creator
